mapper.sql: vip_card_id, card_name, benefit_desc, price, validity_days, store_addr_ids, fee_rule_id, show_buy_count, base_buy_count, step_num, step_add_price, price_cap, sold_count, status, created_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vip_benefit_card (card_name, benefit_desc, price, validity_days, store_addr_ids, fee_rule_id, show_buy_count, base_buy_count, step_num, step_add_price, price_cap, sold_count, status, created_date) VALUES (#{cardName}, #{benefitDesc}, #{price}, #{validityDays}, #{storeAddrIds}, #{feeRuleId}, #{showBuyCount}, #{baseBuyCount}, #{stepNum}, #{stepAddPrice}, #{priceCap}, 0, #{status}, #{createdDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE vip_benefit_card SET card_name = #{cardName}, benefit_desc = #{benefitDesc}, price = #{price}, validity_days = #{validityDays}, store_addr_ids = #{storeAddrIds}, fee_rule_id = #{feeRuleId}, show_buy_count = #{showBuyCount}, base_buy_count = #{baseBuyCount}, step_num = #{stepNum}, step_add_price = #{stepAddPrice}, price_cap = #{priceCap}, status = #{status} WHERE vip_card_id = #{vipCardId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM vip_benefit_card WHERE vip_card_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vip_benefit WHERE vip_card_id = #{vipCardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE vip_benefit_card SET status = #{status} WHERE vip_card_id = #{vipCardId}
